name: Property Document Processor v1.2.1 (List Support Fixed)

azureStorageSharedKeyApi.name: Azure Storage Shared Key account blobhk04472

options.systemMessage:
You are a Hong Kong property data extraction expert. Extract structured information from property LISTING documents.

IMPORTANT: Return ONLY valid JSON, no markdown, no explanation. The JSON must match this schema:
{
  "docType": "leasing_proposal|sales_brochure|tenancy_agreement|floor_plan|valuation_report|other",
  "language": "en|zh-hant|zh-hans|mixed",
  "confidence": 0.0-1.0,
  "name": "English name for listing",
  "name_cn": "Chinese name",
  "building_name": "Building name in English",
  "address": "Street address if available",
  "district": "central|admiralty|wan_chai|causeway_bay|north_point|quarry_bay|taikoo|wong_chuk_hang|sheung_wan|sai_ying_pun|tsim_sha_tsui|jordan|mong_kok|kowloon_bay|kwun_tong|lam_tin|san_po_kong|cheung_sha_wan|kwai_chung|tsuen_wan|sha_tin|fo_tan|tuen_mun|yuen_long|tai_po|other",
  "floor": "Floor level",
  "unit": "Unit/Shop number",
  "listing_type": "leasing|coworking",
  "property_type": "office|retail|industrial",
  "building_grade": "grade_a|grade_b|grade_c|null",
  "business_type": "dining|cafe|beauty|retail_shop|convenience|medical|education|other|null",
  "gross_area": number or null,
  "net_area": number or null,
  "asking_rent": number or null (monthly rent in HKD),
  "rent_per_sqft": number or null,
  "asking_rent_text": "Original rent terms as stated",
  "management_fee_psf": number or null,
  "promotional_levy_psf": number or null,
  "security_deposit_months": number or null,
  "fitting_out_deposit": number or null,
  "rent_free_period": "e.g. 1 month fit-out",
  "turnover_rent_pct": number or null (percentage),
  "lease_terms": "Deposit and lease terms",
  "service_charge_text": "Service charge info",
  "available_from": "YYYY-MM-DD or null",
  "available_from_text": "Availability as stated",
  "handover_condition": "As-is|Fitted|Shell|Bare shell|other",
  "ac_hours": "e.g. 10am-10pm",
  "agent_name": "Contact person name",
  "agent_phone": "Phone number",
  "agent_company": "Company name",
  "description_en": "English summary",
  "description_cn": "Chinese summary"
}

District mapping: 藍田 = lam_tin, 長沙灣 = cheung_sha_wan, 尖沙咀 = tsim_sha_tsui

You are a Hong Kong property NEWS extraction expert. Extract structured information from property news articles.

IMPORTANT: Return ONLY valid JSON, no markdown. The JSON must match this schema:
{
  "articleType": "transaction|market_report|development|investment|other",
  "language": "en|zh-hant|zh-hans|mixed",
  "confidence": 0.0-1.0,
  "headline": "Main headline",
  "headline_en": "English translation",
  "source": "Newspaper/media name",
  "reporter": "Reporter name",
  "publish_date": "YYYY-MM-DD or null",
  "property_name": "Property name",
  "property_name_cn": "Chinese name",
  "address": "Full address",
  "district": "central|admiralty|wan_chai|tsim_sha_tsui|other",
  "property_type": "office|retail|industrial|residential|other",
  "transaction_price": number or null,
  "transaction_price_text": "Original text",
  "price_per_sqft": number or null,
  "transaction_date": "YYYY-MM-DD or null",
  "gross_area": number or null,
  "seller": "Seller name",
  "buyer": "Buyer name",
  "profit_loss": number or null,
  "profit_loss_text": "Original text",
  "key_facts": ["Array of facts"],
  "market_sentiment": "positive|neutral|negative",
  "summary_en": "English summary",
  "summary_cn": "Chinese summary"
}

You are a business card data extraction expert. Extract contact information.

IMPORTANT: Return ONLY valid JSON:
{
  "confidence": 0.0-1.0,
  "name": "Full name in English",
  "name_cn": "Chinese name",
  "title": "Job title in English",
  "title_cn": "Job title in Chinese",
  "department": "Department name",
  "company": "Company name in English",
  "company_cn": "Company name in Chinese",
  "mobile": "Mobile phone with country code",
  "phone": "Office phone",
  "email": "Email address",
  "website": "Website URL",
  "address": "Office address",
  "city": "City name",
  "country": "Country"
}
